comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: CORRECTION to the epic's Context (from task 0730's live probe): the rising floor DOES drop findings on remediation-eligible rounds - the earlier '0 novelty drops ever' figure was a scan artifact (JSON-string-encoded sidecar data fields were silently skipped). Corrected: 33/35 eligible post-flip reviews narrowed with ~111 floored findings, and the live scorer probe (34 pairs, 541 findings) shows 0% errors and perfect carryover discrimination. UNCHANGED: 240 reviews were ineligible because BLOCK verdicts never sign, so the floor still never engages in BLOCK loops - story a850's motivation stands on that finding alone.

compiled_state.description:
## Context
The 2026-07-14 "calibration" analysis (session log to be linked) found plan-review iteration excess is driven by: (1) a ~50-67% per-round BLOCK rate since calibration 2 (commit 96f5f374a, 2026-07-08), with 87% of blocking findings NEW each round; (2) one-defect-to-N-criterion blocking fan-out (up to 10 blocking findings per round from one defect, ticket a879); (3) the convergence rising floor never engaging (287/382 post-flip reviews ineligible, dominant cause: eligibility requires a prior CERTIFIED signature, which BLOCK loops never mint; 0 novelty drops ever recorded); (4) coaching notes + criteria-guide deep-links attach only to ADVISORY findings, never to the blocking findings agents must remediate; (5) plan authors are never routed to docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md, so first drafts predictably fail the LLM tier; (6) the T5c security overlay contributes a large advisory wall (288 findings/7d, 0 blocks) including out-of-scope findings. The operator approved this non-Q2 remediation set for immediate implementation on 2026-07-14; the Q2 items (plan-v2 threshold replay + ac_unverifiable floor sub-grade) are explicitly OUT of this epic pending operator approval.

## Success Criteria
- The six child tickets below are closed with their changes landed on main through Gerrit (LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 per change).
- Work is sequenced to avoid textual conflict with epic/audit-enrichment (ba33 / courtly-linear-iguana), which rewrites src/rebar/llm/plan_review/attest.py: the floor-eligibility story starts only after that epic's plan-review commits land on main.
- No behavioral weakening of the gate: blocking findings still block; dedup groups findings, it does not drop them; coaching remains move-registry-constrained (the reviewer never writes plan text).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All child tickets of this epic are closed.
- [ ] Every child's change landed on main via Gerrit with both gate votes at +1 (visible in the change's vote history at rebar.solutions.navateam.com).
- [ ] `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass on main after the final child lands.

file_impact.reason: container: children touch the plan-review pipeline
